results.summary: skill_version() rejects bold Version form (case-sensitive startswith)
results.evidence: test_reg_cb1_version_parser_divergence passes; bin/benchmark_lib.py:skill_version now delegates to VERSION_PATTERN regex which accepts both `version:` and `**Version:**` forms.

results.summary: SKILL_INSTALL_LOCATIONS missing fourth documented path
results.evidence: test_reg_cb2_missing_fourth_install_path + test_reg_closed_set_drift pass; SKILL_INSTALL_LOCATIONS tuple now carries all four documented paths (benchmark_lib.py:39-44); mechanical/extract_install_locations.py also confirms at audit time.

results.summary: Phase 2 gate threshold 80 WARN vs SKILL.md requirement 120 FAIL
results.evidence: test_reg_cb3_line_count_threshold_drift passes; run_playbook.check_phase_gate phase=2 now returns ok=False with `GATE FAIL Phase 2: EXPLORATION.md is only {n} lines (expected 120+)`. references/orchestrator_protocol.md prose updated to 120 as well.

results.summary: archive_previous_run is non-atomic; control_prompts/ deleted not archived
results.evidence: test_reg_cb4_archive_not_atomic passes; archive_previous_run now stages into previous_runs/<ts>.partial/, copies both quality/ and control_prompts/, then os.renames to previous_runs/<ts>/. control_prompts/ is preserved alongside quality/.

results.summary: PROTECTED_PREFIXES missing AGENTS.md
results.evidence: test_reg_cb5_agents_md_cleanup_reversion passes; PROTECTED_EXACT = ('AGENTS.md',) added and _is_protected now checks path equality against that set in addition to the prefix list.

results.summary: Phase 3 gate checks only 4 of 9 required Phase 2 artifacts
results.evidence: test_reg_cb6_phase3_gate_incomplete passes; check_phase_gate phase=3 now checks all nine Phase 2 artifacts (REQUIREMENTS/QUALITY/CONTRACTS/RUN_CODE_REVIEW + COVERAGE_MATRIX/COMPLETENESS_REPORT/RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS/RUN_SPEC_AUDIT/RUN_TDD_TESTS).

results.summary: docs_present accepts .DS_Store / noise files as documentation
results.evidence: test_reg_cb7_docs_present_noise passes; docs_present now requires is_file() AND non-hidden name AND non-zero size.

results.summary: Iteration suggestion printed unconditionally even on failure
results.evidence: test_reg_cb8_suggest_after_failure passes; print_suggested_next_command now takes a failures_occurred parameter and emits an inspect-and-re-run hint instead of the normal iteration suggestion on failure. Both execute_run call sites pass through the actual failure count.

results.summary: _pkill_fallback missing gh copilot -p pattern
results.evidence: test_reg_cb9_pkill_misses_copilot passes; _pkill_fallback patterns list now includes 'gh copilot -p'.

results.summary: check_run_metadata never called; run-metadata entirely ungated
results.evidence: test_reg_cb10_run_metadata_ungated passes; new check_run_metadata() added to quality_gate.py and wired into check_repo; validates run-*.json filename, JSON parseability, and six required fields.

results.summary: quality_gate checks EXPLORATION.md existence only, not section structure
results.evidence: test_reg_cb11_exploration_structure_ungated passes; _check_exploration_sections now validates the five mandated SKILL.md section headings (Open Exploration Findings, Quality Risks, Pattern Applicability Matrix, Candidate Bugs for Phase 2, Gate Self-Check).

results.summary: Zero-bug sentinel matches "zero" anywhere in prose
results.evidence: test_reg_cb12_zero_bug_loose_regex passes; zero-bug sentinel now requires an anchored `## No confirmed bugs` or `## Zero confirmed bugs` heading (multiline + case-insensitive regex), replacing the free-substring search.

results.summary: detect_skill_version uses substring match without line-start anchor
results.evidence: test_reg_version_parser_substring_reject passes; detect_skill_version now uses the same anchored VERSION_PATTERN regex as benchmark_lib.skill_version, so `description: "The version: 1.4.5 release"` no longer shadows the real version line.

results.summary: validate_iso_date rejects valid ISO 8601 datetimes
results.evidence: test_reg_iso_datetime_grammar passes; validate_iso_date now accepts both date-only (YYYY-MM-DD) and full ISO 8601 datetime (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ | ±HH:MM) forms.

results.summary: _parse_porcelain_path returns quoted paths with surrounding quotes intact
results.evidence: test_reg_porcelain_quoted_paths passes; _parse_porcelain_path now strips surrounding double quotes and unescapes embedded `\"` sequences.

results.summary: Phase 5 entry gate does not enforce SKILL.md Phase 4 completion requirements
results.evidence: test_reg_sa16_phase5_gate_missing_triage, test_reg_sa16_phase5_gate_missing_phase4_checkbox, test_reg_sa16_phase5_gate_passes_when_complete all pass; check_phase_gate phase=5 now hard-stops when spec_audits/ is missing, has no *triage* file, has no *auditor* files, or PROGRESS.md Phase 4 is not `[x]`.

results.summary: Orchestrator prompts omit repo-root SKILL.md from source-checkout bootstrap
results.evidence: test_reg_gap17_agents_support_repo_root_skill passes; both agents/quality-playbook.agent.md and agents/quality-playbook-claude.agent.md now list `SKILL.md` as entry 1 in their install-discovery order.

results.summary: General orchestrator contradicts its own phase-execution ownership model
results.evidence: test_reg_gap18_general_agent_keeps_context_ownership_consistent passes; agents/quality-playbook.agent.md Mode 1 now reads `Start a fresh session or context for Phase 1` instead of `Run Phase 1 in the current session`.

results.summary: Local pytest shim does not honor documented CLI forms
results.evidence: test_reg_gap19_collect_only_does_not_execute_tests and test_reg_gap19_nodeid_is_handled_without_importerror both pass; pytest/__main__.py now parses --collect-only (emits tests without running) and rejects `::` node IDs with a clear stderr message + exit 2 instead of ImportError.

results.summary: Missing docs block code-only runs
results.evidence: test_reg_unfiltered20_phase_mode_warns_not_skips and test_reg_unfiltered20_single_pass_warns_not_skips pass; both run_one_phased and run_one_singlepass now emit a WARN and continue with code-only analysis when docs_gathered/ is absent, rather than SKIPping with exit 1.

results.summary: Runner-generated prompts hardcode one skill-install layout
results.evidence: test_reg_unfiltered21_phase_prompt_mentions_fallback_layouts and test_reg_unfiltered21_single_pass_prompt_mentions_fallback_layouts both pass; new SKILL_FALLBACK_GUIDE constant fronts phase_1, single_pass, and iteration prompts and enumerates all four documented install paths.

results.summary: Child runner failures are reported as successful phases/runs
results.evidence: test_reg_unfiltered22_run_one_phase_propagates_child_failure and test_reg_unfiltered22_run_one_singlepass_propagates_child_failure both pass; run_one_phase and run_one_singlepass now capture run_prompt's exit code and ABORT on non-zero.

results.summary: quality_gate.py misclassifies the bootstrap repo because of fixture repos
results.evidence: test_reg_unfiltered23_language_detection_ignores_fixture_repos passes; detect_project_language's excluded-directory set now contains `repos`, so nested benchmark fixtures don't flip the self-audit repo's detected language.

results.summary: File-existence gate omits valid functional-test filenames
results.evidence: test_reg_parity24_file_existence_accepts_functional_test_go passes; check_file_existence now accepts functional_test.* alongside the other four documented naming variants.

results.summary: Extension checker only validates `test_functional.*`
results.evidence: test_reg_parity25_extension_check_accepts_functionaltest_java passes; check_test_file_extension walks the full documented naming matrix and reports the discovered filename rather than hardcoding test_functional.{ext}.

results.summary: Helper functional-test discovery accepts undocumented `test_functional_test.*`
results.evidence: test_reg_adv26_final_artifact_gaps_rejects_test_functional_test_alias passes; FUNCTIONAL_TEST_PATTERNS no longer contains the undocumented test_functional_test.* alias.

results.summary: Helper summary counts non-canonical regression aliases as coverage
results.evidence: test_reg_adv27_summary_ignores_noncanonical_regression_aliases passes; REGRESSION_TEST_PATTERNS narrowed to the single canonical test_regression.* entry matching the SKILL.md artifact contract.
